naruto.name: Naruto
naruto.description: Naruto is a ninja anime following Naruto Uzumaki who dreams of becoming the Hokage of the Hidden Leaf Village.

one_piece.name: One Piece
one_piece.description: One Piece follows Monkey D. Luffy and his pirate crew searching for the legendary treasure called One Piece.

jujutsu_kaisen.name: Jujutsu Kaisen
jujutsu_kaisen.description: Jujutsu Kaisen follows Yuji Itadori as he enters the world of cursed spirits and jujutsu sorcerers.

dragon_ball.name: Dragon Ball
dragon_ball.description: Dragon Ball follows the adventures of Goku and his friends protecting Earth from powerful enemies.

bleach.name: Bleach
bleach.description: Bleach follows Ichigo Kurosaki, a teenager who gains the powers of a Soul Reaper and protects humans from evil spirits called Hollows.
